name: Test Service Library: Error Codes
title: Test Service Library: Error Codes
description: For all status report functions, the following return values and raised error classes are applied. The query functions always use a wider range of return values. In most cases the particular check of the return value isn't necessary. A simple check to a value >0 (stands for valid) is enough.
Please refer the specification of each query function to get the complete value range of return values.
tables: Return Value Meanings and Raised Error Class
Check does not existClass: Access to non-existing check
Check does not support this queryClass: Invalid query on check
The Check was never activeClass: Invalid query on check
Pointer to CAPL-Argument is NULLClass: Invalid test specification
There are multiple objects that match on this queryClass: Ambiguous query. Multiple objects match on this query
Node layer module is deactivated and cannot process the query
